description: Human-labeled QA pairs for the Xperience-10M pour-over sample graph (max-frames 80). Gold answers were written by reading the episode annotations directly; the evaluator must reproduce them from the exported graph alone. Timestamps are device timestamps as used in scene_graph.json.

questions.text: Does the memory contain a kettle?
Alias check: gooseneck kettle should resolve to kettle.
Alias check: digital scale should resolve to scale.
Alias check: glass carafe should resolve to carafe.
Does the memory contain a dripper?
Negative: no microwave appears in this episode.
Negative: no laptop appears in this episode.
Kettle is in the first annotated frame.
Bottle is in the first annotated frame.
Scoop is visible while transferring grounds.
Frame has no object annotations; visibility must not be invented.
Carafe is not annotated during the grounds transfer.
The hand grasps the kettle.
Any hand interaction with the kettle.
The hand grasps the carafe.
The hand grasps the lid.
The hand contacts the dripper.
The scale is interacted with but never grasped.
The bottle is visible but never hand-interacted in these frames.
Subtask at the first frame.
Subtask during grounds transfer.

questions.answer: Prepare coffee equipment and scoop grounds
questions.text: Subtask while preparing equipment.
Subtask at the last frame.
Action at the first frame.
Action during grounds transfer.
Action while holding the carafe.
No labeled action interval covers the last frame.
The kettle appears before the scoop.
The carafe appears after the kettle.
The bottle appears before the carafe.
Wearer position at the kettle's last sighting.
Wearer position at the scoop's last sighting.
